channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti, 28th March
item.description:
Outside The Windsor 888 Old Kent Road Remove graffiti from lamppost

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 888, Old Kent Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped, 28th March
item.description:
Dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Park, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping on ceres road, 28th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a load of cardboard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Nicholas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree has been hit and is leaning badly into the road, 28th March
item.description:
The tree has been hit and is leaning badly into the road. It has got much worse today with the wind. Please fix urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Holland Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flying tipping, 28th March
item.description:
Someone went and dropped rubbish bin and a bag of rubbish in front of our building. Francis Bacon Lodge 73 Waghorn Street SE15 4LA. The pictures has attracted please see what you can do about this for the rubbish to remove. Thank Understanding The Lodge Secretary

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Waghorn Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is an ASDA trolley behind the bike container. Please collect it before someone damages a car., 28th March
item.description:
A trolley has been there for weeks. Collect it as it will damage cars or property when someone does something stupid.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-bike obstructing pavement, 28th March
item.description:
E-bike parked in the middle of the public footpath next to pedestrian crossing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Owen Street, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour Flytipping, 28th March
item.description:
Neighbour (known) has dumped rubbish outside the back of their house. It has been like this for 6-8 weeks, bags are starting to be ripped open by animals . This is the second time this has happened

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Courtlands Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous household waste dumping, 28th March
item.description:
The phone cable cabinets are constantly used as a dumping ground for household waste. The type of litter is consistent, suggesting the same culprit, and needs to be cleaned weekly by residents. Attached is a photo with containing identifying details.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Stodart Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 28th March
item.description:
Pagnall Street by Fordham Park. Please remove flypostering from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pagnell Street, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Gas bottles and balloons fly tipped, 28th March
item.description:
Gas bottles and balloons fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenlea Road, Eltham

item.title: This fridge been left here weeks now, 28th March
item.description:
This fridge freezer been here for weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holly Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New Graffiti in 2 locations on Plumbridge Street, 28th March
item.description:
Very unattractive and will encourage more graffiti and littering

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumbridge Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amounts of rubbish dumped on Seal Street E8 at Shacklewell Lane, 28th March
item.description:
Hello, please remove the dumped rubbish on Seal Street E8 at Shacklewell Lane. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shacklewell Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken wooden shelves and cardboard boxes flytipped, 28th March
item.description:
Hi, Hope you’re well and thanks for looking into this! There have been a number of large cardboard boxes, a wooden pallet and some broken wooden shelves left outside of 103-105 Chatham street. It was present as of this morning (28th March 2026).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes, 28th March
item.description:
This pothole has been in the road for some time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birchwood Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped broken mirror, 28th March
item.description:
Fly tipped broken mirror

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 large kitchen white goods were fly tipped on the pavement., 28th March
item.description:
I saw a man putting something there but I first thought he was delivery goods. Later notice he was fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marlborough Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tolley in the road, 28th March
item.description:
There's a trolley in the road which could cause an accident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hammelton Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Checking if tree is protected, 28th March
item.description:
I want to check if these trees are protected as we would like to remove them due to them blocking our fence panels. They are also restricting the alleyway behind our property meaning that no one can access this area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
